summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 listed open PRs. No GitHub mutations planned; this shard is not a dedupe cluster and has no shared canonical.

actions.reason: Independent PR inventory item; keep open for normal maintainer/proof review.
Substantive webchat session-state fix path; classify independently and leave to normal maintainer review.
Focused gateway compatibility fix with proof, not part of a dedupe family in this shard.
Large feature PR with review findings and mixed check context; related to channel/gateway work but not safely closable or mergeable in this plan shard.
Related to the broader tool-schema quarantine family, but has unique open work and review findings, so keep open for maintainer/author follow-up.
Small independent CI guard PR with sufficient proof, not a dedupe close candidate.
Draft maintainer-owned PR in the tool-schema hardening family with a distinct surface; keep related, not duplicate-close.
Technical correctness judgment is explicitly unresolved by a human comment and required_human includes technical_correctness_judgment.
Related to the open Telegram duplicate-approval issue, but not merge-ready and not safe for fixed-by closeout.
Draft maintainer-owned PR in a related hardening family; keep open for author changes rather than close or merge.

needs_human: #89693 requires maintainer technical-correctness judgment because a human comment flags an over-broad heuristic and real behavior proof is failing.
